song.title: What Things Were Gains to Me
song.author: Philippians 3:7
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D What things were gains to me . Bm G A These I now count as loss . D Jesus has set me free . Bm A From what I was! . D All of the things I had . Bm G A Everything good or bad, . D I count as refuse . G A D That I may gain Christ!
[C] . D A I won’t give up! . D G I will keep running until . D G I have attained . A The goal of my calling! . D A I must press on! . D G I must pursue until . D G I lay hold of Him . A D Who laid hold of me! --- [V2] Forget the things behind! Stretch for the things before! Press onward with this mind- |Always want more! Seeking in Him to grow. Increasingly to know Him that I daily | might be found in Christ.
